title: The First Day of School
synopsis: A nervous child starts school and finds that the day is kinder than expected.
sentences: Lena woke up early on the first day of school.
She put on her new uniform and looked at herself in the mirror.
Her stomach felt strange because she did not know anyone in her class.
On the way to school, her father told her that everybody feels nervous sometimes.
At the gate, many children were talking, laughing, and holding bright bags.
Lena took a deep breath and walked into her classroom.
The teacher smiled and showed her an empty seat by the window.
Soon a girl next to her asked if she wanted to share colored pencils.
That small question made Lena feel much better.
By lunchtime, she knew two names and had already answered one question aloud.
When the final bell rang, Lena ran to her father with a huge smile.
The first day had not been scary after all.
